title: IC2X UU-Matter
description: Addon for IC2-Experimental adding JEI pages for UU-Matter creation
body:
This mod is an addon for Industrial Craft adding JEI pages for UU-Matter creation.

 

By default IC2 Experimental does not add much JEI information on how to create UU-Matter.

This mod fixes that by adding 4 new JEI categories for Matter Fabricator, Pattern Storage, Replicator and Scanner.


Client-side: Required

Server-side: Optional


The Matter Fabricator category shows:
* What IC2 power tier the machine has.
* EU/tick and how much EU is required to create 1 mb of UU-Matter.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/47X9IMcP/images/b968c950ccc418d33fbec0a63901618caf9dffe5.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/47X9IMcP/images/33ff237bc4a0be2e70ead8f42774dd6ebedcd217.png)

The Patter Storage category shows:
* How much EU and UU-Matter items require to be replicated.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/47X9IMcP/images/5993e0f9488421b0081e81d3a68fcf017b5ad2f8.png)

The Replication category shows:
* What IC2 power tier the machine has.
* How much EU and UU-Matter is required to replicate 1 item.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/47X9IMcP/images/161a8f9044db3f4b92b9d991432a1ab6bc4086ac.png)

The Scanner category shows:
* What IC2 power tier the machine has.
* How much EU is required to scan 1 item.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/47X9IMcP/images/0edba44eaaf122631a908d6bf14813d66092a651.png)
